history.content:
<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. I can’t go straight because the path ahead is open to the right at row 02 column C and D, but from there I need to go down while avoiding lava. Currently row 03 column C is lava (`L`), so I must go down via a column other than C. The safest route is to turn around toward the left to reposition, then later approach the goal from column D or B. First, turn left to start redirecting away from column C.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Now I’m at row 02 column B facing up (`^`). Forward (row 01 column B) is a wall (`#`), so I need to rotate to find an open move. Turning right will face right, toward row 02 column C which is floor (`.`), so that’s a safe next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell in front (row 02 column C) is `.` so I can move safely toward the goal area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 02 column C facing right (`>`). Forward (row 02 column D) is `.` so I should move one step toward the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 02 column D facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D, so I need to go down. The cell in front when turning down is row 03 column D, which is `.` so it’s safe.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 02 column D facing down (`v`). Forward is row 03 column D which is `.` (safe). Moving forward brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 03 column D facing down (`v`). The cell in front is row 04 column D, which contains `G` (the goal). I should move forward into it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
